title: Two and a Half Men
subTitle: Charlie, a jingle writer, lives freely until his dull brother Alan and his 10-year-old nephew move into his Malibu beach house, forcing him to change.

title: Welcome to Waikiki
subTitle: Three clueless men have the aspiration of making a movie. In order to fund their dreams, they open a guest house, even though they do not know how to run it.

title: Youth of May
subTitle: Hee-tae discovers that Myung-hee has not returned home since their outing yesterday and proceeds to search urgently for her.

title: Be Melodramatic
subTitle: Awkwardly wading through their lives, three long-time friends in their thirties learn that they are neither too old to start afresh nor too young not to have learnt from their past mistakes.

title: Cafe Shots
subTitle: Highlights of renowned series are presented concisely in order to give a glimpse into memorable scenes from the shows.

title: Dali & Cocky Prince
subTitle: Tae Jin informs Da Li that Moo Hak had approached her with malicious intent in order to alter his image to her. Later, he becomes angry at Da Li for mistrusting him.

title: Doctor Stranger
subTitle: As a child, Park Hoon is captured with his father and forced to live in North Korea. Though he becomes a gifted medical student, he flees to South Korea when his lover is captured and his father dies.

title: Pretty Little Liars
subTitle: Four friends unite against a mysterious enemy who exposes their deepest secrets and threatens their lives, while simultaneously looking into the vanishing of their closest friend.

title: Grey's Anatomy
subTitle: Surgical interns and their supervisors embark on a medical journey where they become part of heart-wrenching stories and make life-changing decisions in order to become the finest doctors.

title: Temptation Island
subTitle: Couples escape to a tropical haven where they face a life-altering choice to commit forever or part ways. However, paradise becomes their ultimate love test.
